data.title: A Phase 1 Open-Label, Multi-Center, Safety and Efficacy Study of PRT2527 as Monotherapy and in Combination With Zanubrutinib or Venetoclax in Participants With Relapsed/Refractory Hematologic Malignancies
data.country: Switzerland, Australia, United Kingdom, France, Canada, South Korea, Germany, Italy, United States, Poland
data.brief_summary: This is a Phase 1 dose-escalation study of PRT2527, a potent and highly selective cyclin-dependent kinase (CDK) 9 inhibitor, in participants with select relapsed or refractory (R/R) hematologic malignancies. The purpose of this study is to evaluate the safety, tolerability, recommended phase 2 dose (PR2D), and preliminary efficacy of PRT2527 as a monotherapy and in combination with zanubrutinib or venetoclax.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Willing and able to comply with all scheduled visits, treatment plan, laboratory tests, lifestyle considerations, and other study procedures
* Histologically or cytologically confirmed diagnosis of aggressive B-cell lymphoma subtypes, MCL, MZL, or CLL/SLL (including Richter's
endpoints: Safety and tolerability of PRT2527 monotherapy and in combination with zanubrutinib or venetoclax: AEs, CTCAE Assessments
Maximum tolerated dose (MTD)/Recommended phase 2 dose (RP2D) of PRT2527 monotherapy and in combination with zanubrutinib or venetoclax

data.title: A Phase 1a/b Trial of CG-806 in Patients With Relapsed/Refractory Acute Myeloid Leukemia or Higher-Risk Myelodysplastic Syndromes
data.brief_summary: This study is being done to evaluate the safety, tolerability and antitumor activity of oral CG-806 (luxeptinib) for the treatment of patients with Acute Myeloid Leukemia (except APML), secondary AML, therapy-related AML, or higher-risk MDS, whose disease has relapsed, is refractory or who are ineligible for or intolerant of intensive chemotherapy or transplantation.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Key Inclusion Criteria:

* Age ≥18 years
* Life expectancy of at least 3 months
* ECOG Performance Status ≤ 2
* Patients must be able to swallow capsules
* Adequate hematologic parameters, unless cytopenias are disease caused
* Adequate renal, liver and cardiac functions

Key Exclusion Criteria:

*
endpoints: Incidence of treatment-emergent adverse events of CG-806
Establish a CG-806 dose that maintains a biologically active plasma concentration
Establish a recommended dose for future development of CG-806
